com.jsyn.swing

Class EnvelopeEditorBox

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.awt.Component
      • java.awt.Container
        • javax.swing.JComponent
          • javax.swing.JPanel
            • com.jsyn.swing.XYController
              • com.jsyn.swing.EnvelopeEditorBox
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.awt.event.MouseListener, java.awt.event.MouseMotionListener, java.awt.image.ImageObserver, java.awt.MenuContainer, java.io.Serializable, java.util.EventListener, javax.accessibility.Accessible

    public class EnvelopeEditorBox
extends XYController
implements java.awt.event.MouseListener, java.awt.event.MouseMotionListener
    Edit a list of ordered duration,value pairs suitable for use with a SegmentedEnvelope.
    Author:
    (C) 1997-2013 Phil Burk, SoftSynth.com
    See Also:
    EnvelopePoints, SegmentedEnvelope, VariableRateDataReader, Serialized Form
